Home Gallery

Custom Locker Room Installations

Professional Installations

Collegiate & Professional Locker Rooms

From Division I football programs to professional hockey clubs, every room we build is designed to match the identity of the team that uses it. Custom wood species, team colors, logo plaques, and hardware — built to last a career. Start your project.

hockey

Ice Hockey Facilities

Custom Hockey Locker Rooms

Hockey equipment is heavy, wet, and needs proper ventilation. Our hockey locker rooms are built with reinforced wood construction, integrated skate hooks, and airflow panels designed specifically for the demands of an ice rink environment.

Hockey

Hockey Storage

Hockey

sports

Versatile Solutions

Football & Multi-Sport Facilities

Football lockers need space — for helmets, shoulder pads, cleats, and uniforms. Our multi-sport rooms are designed for programs that share facilities across seasons, with modular configurations that adapt to whatever your team brings in.

lockers

Premium Craftsmanship

Custom Wood Locker Designs

Every locker is built to order. Choose your wood finish, door style, hardware, and team branding. Our custom design consultation is free — we help you figure out exactly what your room needs before a single piece of wood is cut.

Thirty years of projects means no two rooms look the same. These installations represent the range of programs we serve — high school, collegiate, and professional — across every sport and every budget.

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Custom wood lockers, priced right. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. Match any US competitor's price. Free consultation.
